narrative:
Madison Local Sd school district has 14,465 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.2 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -8.1% D−R vs -16.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
